title: Sri Krishna Leele
subTitle: Sri Krishna Leele

title: Poorvapara
subTitle: A small-town mother yearns to reconnect with her busy son living in America, making heartfelt efforts to bridge the distance and win back his attention.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Muddina Kanmani
subTitle: Shivaram's mother desires a grandson. However, when her daughter-in-law gives birth to a baby girl, Shivaram decides to bring home his friend's newborn son.

title: Samayada Gombe
subTitle: Young Anil flees his home, fearing police arrest, and is adopted by Rangappa, a lorry driver, who renames him Guru. Years later, an unexpected twist of fate reunites him with his long-lost sister.

title: Sahukara
subTitle: Muthu, a faithful servant, works for Sahukara. However, when Sahukara realises Ranganayaki, the one he loves likes Muthu, he throws Muthu out of the house.

title: Sye Raa Narasimha Reddy
subTitle: Uyyalawada Narasimha Reddy, the ruler of the Rayalaseema region, resists the tyranny of the East India Company and sparks a revolution in the process.

title: Daasa
subTitle: Mohan Das, devoted to his mother, is thrown into turmoil when she is falsely accused of murder, forcing him into a desperate struggle to clear her name and uncover the truth.

title: Kolegaara
subTitle: Karthikeyan, a police officer, investigates a murder case and suspects two women to be involved. However, the women's neighbour claims to be the killer.

title: Kittu Puttu
subTitle: Kittu and Puttu, sons of a rich businessman, want to become detectives. However, things take a turn when Puttu gets kidnapped.

title: Rathna Manjari
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Khaidi
subTitle: When a poor farmer's son, Suryam, falls in love with a vicious feudal lord's daughter, he ensures that Suryam's life is made miserable.

title: Durgi
subTitle: Durgi lives happily with her family until a few men rape her sister and even kill her father. Agitated, she decides to seek revenge.

title: Kanchana Ganga
subTitle: After experiencing betrayal, Soorya develops an aversion to the concept of love. However, his life changes when he meets Urmila and strikes a bond with her.

title: Ragini IPS
subTitle: Ragini, a police officer, strives to rid the society of anti-social elements by taking on the corrupt local MLA and his son. To avenge the humiliation, the MLA's son plots to sexually assault Ragini.

title: Laali Haadu
subTitle: A young couple deeply in love with each other decides to sacrifice their relationship because their parents do not approve of them. However, fate has different plans for them.

title: Rajani Kantha
subTitle: A man, who is born with a cleft palate, has to face a lot of mockery from people. However, he eventually learns to become stronger.

title: Namma Ooru
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Savitri
subTitle: A young Brahmin woman marries an old priest due to her family's dire financial situation. However, unhappy with her marriage, she begins an affair with a non-Brahmin visitor.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Dil
subTitle: An honest police officer strives to destroy the illicit nexus prevalent between corrupt politicians and the police force. However, his quest has unexpected consequences for his loved ones.

title: Lucky
subTitle: Lucky goes for a job interview where the woman who rejected him turns out to be his employer. Afraid that she will not hire him, he decides to change his identity.

title: Rishi
subTitle: Rishi, a thief, happens to own a floppy disk incriminating a minister of murder. Things turn chaotic when his lookalike Velu is targeted by the minister for the footage.

title: Bangaarada Panjara
subTitle: Beera, an ordinary shepherd, lives a peaceful life with his parents. However, his life takes an unforeseeable twist when his biological mother, Janaki, arrives in his village and takes him away.

title: Annayya
subTitle: Annayya, the young son of a wealthy landlord, has to face numerous challenges when his father decides to get married to Nagamani after his mother's death.

title: Ravana
subTitle: Vinod, an orphan, falls in love with his classmate Divya. When he realises that she considers him as a friend and is in love with someone else, he takes up the risky task of reuniting two lovers.
